truth_contract.validation_scope: The timing fields measure only the classical baseline path in this Python/NumPy environment. Attached QSVT fields are polynomial proxies and are not quantum runtimes.

benchmark_environment.stability_note: Timing fields are environment-dependent snapshots. Use metrics and QSVT proxy fields for stable schema checks; regenerate timings deliberately for benchmark studies.

notes: Dense spectral matrix functions are exact small-system references for QSVT polynomial approximation studies.
